responsibilities.entry: Implement Workers, Pages Functions and bindings using Cloudflare-documented runtime APIs.
Return valid Response objects from Worker fetch handlers.
Use env bindings for Cloudflare resources inside Workers.
Keep D1, KV, R2, Durable Object, Queue, Workflow, Workers AI and Vectorize behaviour aligned to documented APIs.

constraints.entry: Do not invent Cloudflare behaviour not present in developers.cloudflare.com.
Do not hard-code secrets or tokens.
Do not claim production verification from local-only tests.
